params.name: The Prince
params.description:
On Jul 14, 1532 AD, Machiavelli's The Prince was first published.
Machiavelli's famous work of political science. The Prince draws on his many years of political experience and offers a theoretical summary of his views. In its 26 chapters, he detailed his own theory of monarchy, using historical examples and assuming human nature in a negative light. Machiavelli believed that states emerge out of human needs, rather than as a result of divine right. He separated politics from morality, arguin …
